desc.zh: 經典網店：MariaDB 用於訂單/庫存，Redis 用於會話/快取，Nginx 作反向代理，Kubernetes 容器監控
desc.en: Classic web store: MariaDB for orders/inventory, Redis for sessions/cache, Nginx as reverse proxy, Kubernetes container monitoring.

templates.yaml:
# E-Commerce Platform — MariaDB + Redis + Nginx + Kubernetes
mysql_connections: "150"
mysql_connections_critical: "200"
mysql_cpu: "75"

redis_memory_used_bytes: "3221225472"
redis_memory_used_bytes_critical: "4294967296"
redis_connected_clients: "3000"

nginx_connections: "2000"
nginx_request_rate: "8000"
nginx_waiting: "300"

container_cpu: "75"
container_memory: "80"

_routing:
  receiver_type: slack
  webhook_url: https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz
  group_by: [alertname, severity]
  group_wait: "30s"
  repeat_interval: "4h"

_metadata:
  owner: ecommerce-team
  tier: production

desc.zh: 高吞吐 IoT：Kafka 資料引入、MongoDB 時序儲存、JVM 處理服務
desc.en: High-throughput IoT: Kafka ingestion, MongoDB time-series storage, JVM-based processing services.

templates.yaml:
# IoT Data Pipeline — Kafka + MongoDB + JVM + Kubernetes
kafka_consumer_lag: "50000"
kafka_consumer_lag_critical: "200000"
kafka_broker_count: "3"
kafka_active_controllers: "1"
kafka_under_replicated_partitions: "0"
kafka_request_rate: "15000"

mongodb_connections_current: "200"
mongodb_connections_current_critical: "300"
mongodb_repl_lag_seconds: "5"

jvm_gc_pause: "0.8"
jvm_memory: "85"
jvm_threads: "400"

container_cpu: "80"
container_memory: "85"

_routing:
  receiver_type: pagerduty
  group_by: [alertname, topic]
  group_wait: "1m"
  group_interval: "5m"
  repeat_interval: "12h"

_metadata:
  owner: iot-platform-team
  tier: production

desc.zh: SaaS 後端：PostgreSQL 核心資料、Redis 快取、Elasticsearch 全文搜尋、JVM 服務
desc.en: SaaS backend: PostgreSQL for core data, Redis for caching, Elasticsearch for full-text search, JVM services.

templates.yaml:
# SaaS Multi-Service — PostgreSQL + Redis + ES + JVM + K8s
pg_connections: "100"
pg_connections_critical: "150"
pg_replication_lag: "10"

redis_memory_used_bytes: "2147483648"
redis_connected_clients: "2000"

es_jvm_memory_used_percent: "80"
es_jvm_memory_used_percent_critical: "92"
es_filesystem_free_percent: "20"

jvm_memory: "80"
jvm_gc_pause: "0.5"
jvm_threads: "500"

container_cpu: "70"
container_memory: "80"

_routing:
  receiver_type: webhook
  webhook_url: https://hooks.example.com/alerts
  group_wait: "30s"
  repeat_interval: "6h"

_metadata:
  owner: backend-team
  tier: production

desc.zh: 實時分析：Kafka 事件串流、ClickHouse OLAP 儲存、JVM 分析工作程式
desc.en: Real-time analytics: Kafka event streaming, ClickHouse OLAP storage, JVM analytics workers.

templates.yaml:
# Real-time Analytics — ClickHouse + Kafka + JVM + K8s
clickhouse_queries_rate: "800"
clickhouse_queries_rate_critical: "1200"
clickhouse_active_connections: "150"

kafka_consumer_lag: "100000"
kafka_consumer_lag_critical: "500000"
kafka_broker_count: "5"
kafka_request_rate: "20000"

jvm_memory: "85"
jvm_gc_pause: "1.0"

container_cpu: "85"
container_memory: "90"

_routing:
  receiver_type: email
  group_wait: "2m"
  group_interval: "5m"
  repeat_interval: "24h"

_metadata:
  owner: analytics-team
  tier: production

desc.zh: 企業級 DB：Oracle 用於核心交易、DB2 用於資料倉儲，搭配 K8s 容器化部署監控
desc.en: Enterprise DBs: Oracle for core transactions, DB2 for data warehouse, with K8s containerized deployment monitoring.

templates.yaml:
# Enterprise Database — Oracle + DB2 + Kubernetes
oracle_sessions_active: "150"
oracle_sessions_active_critical: "250"
oracle_tablespace_used_percent: "80"
oracle_tablespace_used_percent_critical: "90"

db2_connections_active: "180"
db2_connections_active_critical: "250"
db2_bufferpool_hit_ratio: "0.95"

container_cpu: "80"
container_memory: "85"

_routing_profile: team-dba-global

_metadata:
  owner: dba-team
  tier: production
  domain: finance

desc.zh: 事件驅動架構：RabbitMQ 訊息佇列、PostgreSQL 事件溯源、JVM 微服務
desc.en: Event-driven architecture: RabbitMQ message queue, PostgreSQL event sourcing, JVM microservices.

templates.yaml:
# Event-Driven Microservices — RabbitMQ + PostgreSQL + JVM + K8s
rabbitmq_queue_messages: "50000"
rabbitmq_queue_messages_critical: "100000"
rabbitmq_node_mem_percent: "75"
rabbitmq_connections: "800"
rabbitmq_consumers: "10"
rabbitmq_unacked_messages: "5000"

pg_connections: "120"
pg_replication_lag: "5"

jvm_memory: "75"
jvm_gc_pause: "0.3"
jvm_threads: "300"

container_cpu: "70"
container_memory: "80"

_routing:
  receiver_type: slack
  webhook_url: https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz
  group_wait: "30s"
  repeat_interval: "4h"

_metadata:
  owner: microservices-team
  tier: production

desc.zh: 搜尋平台：Elasticsearch 叢集搜尋引擎、Nginx 負載均衡、JVM 索引服務
desc.en: Search platform: Elasticsearch cluster search engine, Nginx load balancer, JVM indexing services.

templates.yaml:
# Search Platform — Elasticsearch + Nginx + JVM + K8s
es_jvm_memory_used_percent: "75"
es_jvm_memory_used_percent_critical: "88"
es_filesystem_free_percent: "20"
es_filesystem_free_percent_critical: "10"

nginx_connections: "5000"
nginx_request_rate: "10000"
nginx_waiting: "500"

jvm_memory: "80"
jvm_gc_pause: "0.5"

container_cpu: "80"
container_memory: "85"

_routing_profile: team-sre-apac

_metadata:
  owner: search-team
  tier: production

desc.zh: 展示如何設定臨時維護窗口、自動過期和靜默模式
desc.en: Shows how to set up a temporary maintenance window with auto-expiry and silent mode.

templates.yaml:
# Maintenance Window Demo
mysql_connections: "200"
mysql_cpu: "90"

_state_maintenance:
  expires: "2026-03-20T06:00:00Z"

_silent_mode:
  expires: "2026-03-15T12:00:00Z"

_routing:
  receiver_type: teams
  webhook_url: https://teams.example.com/webhook
  group_wait: "1m"
  repeat_interval: "12h"

desc.zh: 使用 _routing_profile 取代 inline _routing — 團隊共用路由設定、減少配置重複
desc.en: Use _routing_profile instead of inline _routing — share routing settings across tenants, reduce config duplication.

templates.yaml:
# Routing Profile Demo (ADR-007)
mysql_connections: "80"
mysql_cpu: "70"
container_cpu: "80"
container_memory: "85"

_routing_profile: team-sre-apac

_metadata:
  runbook_url: https://runbooks.example.com/db-b
  owner: sre-apac
  tier: production
  domain: finance

desc.zh: 金融 domain：使用 PagerDuty（禁止 Slack/webhook）、嚴格閾值、合規 metadata
desc.en: Finance domain: PagerDuty required (Slack/webhook forbidden), strict thresholds, compliance metadata.

templates.yaml:
# Finance Compliance — Oracle + PostgreSQL + K8s
oracle_sessions_active: "100"
oracle_sessions_active_critical: "150"
oracle_tablespace_used_percent: "75"
oracle_tablespace_used_percent_critical: "85"

pg_connections: "80"
pg_connections_critical: "120"
pg_replication_lag: "5"

container_cpu: "70"
container_memory: "80"

_routing_profile: domain-finance-tier1

_domain_policy: finance

_metadata:
  owner: finance-dba-team
  tier: production
  domain: finance
  compliance: SOX

desc.zh: 絕對最小配置 — 完美入門選擇。省略的 key 套用平台預設值。
desc.en: The absolute minimum config — perfect for getting started. Omitted keys use platform defaults.

templates.yaml:
# Minimal — just thresholds, platform defaults handle the rest
mysql_connections: "100"
mysql_cpu: "80"
